raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Waj mutns/ kas ispestihs
muhs no fcho warrenu Deewu
Rohkas? fchee irr tee Deewi/ kas
tohs Egipterus mohzijuschi ar
wiffadahn Mohzibahin Tukf-
nefi*
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Stiprinaicetees/ un turraj-
tees ka Wihri juhs Wilisteri/ ka
jums teem Eebreereem ne jakal-
po/ lihdska tee jums irr kalpoju-
icht. Turrajtees wihrifchki/ un
kanject wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Tad kawahs tee Wilisteri/
un Israëls tappe kauts/ un beh-
dse ikweens us tawu Dsihwokli.
Un tur notikke warren leela Kan-
fhana/ jo no Israëla tappe trihs-
Defnuts tubhstoschi Kahjineeki
aptauti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tas Deewa Schkirsts
tappe nemts/ un Eelusdiwi Deh-
li Owuns un Pineas nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Tad tezzeja weens Wihrs
no Benjaminu no teem Kaxxa-
Pulkeem/ un nahze tai Deenâ
uhs Sihlu/ un bij sawas Drehs-
bes japlohfis/ un Semme btja us
winna Galwu:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un tam nahkoht/ rangi/ tad
fehdeja Eelus us weenu Krehsfu
Zelfmalli randsdams/ jo winna
Sirds trihfeja ta Deewa Schkir-
sta deht. Kad nu tas Wihrs nah-
ze/ Pilsfahta to stahstidams/ tad
brehze wiss Pilssfahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Un kad Eelus to Brehs-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. (Eelus nu bija dewindefs-
mits un astonus Gaddus twezz/
un winna Azzis jaw bija tum-
chas mettuschees/ un ne warreja
wats redseht.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un tas Wihrs fazzija us
Eelu: Es efinu tas/ kas no teem
Kaxxa-Pulkeem nahzis/ un efinu
schodeen no teem Kaxxa-Pulkeem
behdsis; tad fazzija winch: ko tu
labb taffi/ mans Dehls?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un tas Wehstnefs atbil-
deja/ un fazzija: Israëls irr beh-
dsfs preekfsch teem Wilistexeem/ un
leela Kauschana irr starp teem
Landim notikkuti/ ir tawi divi
Dehli Owuns un Pineas irr no-
miruschi/ir tas Deewa Schkirsts
irr nemts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un tas notikkahs/ kad schis
to Deewa Schkirstu peeminneja/
tad kritte winch no ta Krehsfaat-
pakfiz fahnis Wahrtim/ un no-
lause sawu Kaklu/ un nomirre/
jo tas Wihrs bija wezz ungruhts/
un teesaja Israëlu tichetrdefmits
Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Un winna Weddekle/ Pi-
neasa Seewa/ bija genuhta/ un
gaidjahs/ kad nu fchi to Slawu
dfirdeja/ ka tas Deewa Schkirsts
nemts bija/ un winnas Tehwo-
zis nomirrs lihds ar winnas
Wihrn/ tad winna lohzijahs un
dsemdeja / jo tahs Sahpes us-
brukke winnat.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
